scripts.r2:queue:create: wrangler queues create afenda-r2-events || echo Queue already exists: afenda-r2-events
scripts.r2:queue:create:dlq: wrangler queues create afenda-r2-events-dlq || echo Queue already exists: afenda-r2-events-dlq
scripts.r2:notify:create:attachments: wrangler r2 bucket notification create axis-attachments --queue afenda-r2-events --event-types object-create object-delete --description "AFENDA attachments bucket events" || echo Notification already configured for axis-attachments
scripts.r2:notify:create:backup: wrangler r2 bucket notification create axis-attachments-backup --queue afenda-r2-events --event-types object-create object-delete --description "AFENDA backup bucket events" || echo Notification already configured for axis-attachments-backup
scripts.r2:cors:set:attachments: wrangler r2 bucket cors set axis-attachments --file ./scripts/r2-cors.json -y
scripts.r2:cors:list:attachments: wrangler r2 bucket cors list axis-attachments
scripts.r2:cors:set:backup: wrangler r2 bucket cors set axis-attachments-backup --file ./scripts/r2-cors.json -y
scripts.r2:cors:list:backup: wrangler r2 bucket cors list axis-attachments-backup
scripts.r2:local-uploads:get:attachments: wrangler r2 bucket local-uploads get axis-attachments
scripts.r2:local-uploads:get:backup: wrangler r2 bucket local-uploads get axis-attachments-backup
scripts.r2:dev-url:get:attachments: wrangler r2 bucket dev-url get axis-attachments
scripts.r2:dev-url:get:backup: wrangler r2 bucket dev-url get axis-attachments-backup
scripts.r2:lifecycle:list:attachments: wrangler r2 bucket lifecycle list axis-attachments
scripts.r2:lifecycle:list:backup: wrangler r2 bucket lifecycle list axis-attachments-backup
scripts.r2:lock:list:attachments: wrangler r2 bucket lock list axis-attachments
scripts.r2:lock:list:backup: wrangler r2 bucket lock list axis-attachments-backup
scripts.r2:notification:list:attachments: wrangler r2 bucket notification list axis-attachments || echo No notification config for axis-attachments
scripts.r2:notification:list:backup: wrangler r2 bucket notification list axis-attachments-backup || echo No notification config for axis-attachments-backup
scripts.r2:domain:list:attachments: wrangler r2 bucket domain list axis-attachments
scripts.r2:domain:list:backup: wrangler r2 bucket domain list axis-attachments-backup
scripts.r2:audit:all: pnpm r2:list && pnpm r2:cors:list:attachments && pnpm r2:cors:list:backup && pnpm r2:local-uploads:get:attachments && pnpm r2:local-uploads:get:backup && pnpm r2:dev-url:get:attachments && pnpm r2:dev-url:get:backup && pnpm r2:lifecycle:list:attachments && pnpm r2:lifecycle:list:backup && pnpm r2:lock:list:attachments && pnpm r2:lock:list:backup && pnpm r2:notification:list:attachments && pnpm r2:notification:list:backup && pnpm r2:domain:list:attachments && pnpm r2:domain:list:backup
scripts.e2e:auth: pnpm -C apps/web exec playwright test e2e/smoke.spec.ts --project=chromium --workers=1
scripts.e2e:auth:reuse: set PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000&& pnpm -C apps/web exec playwright test e2e/smoke.spec.ts --project=chromium --workers=1
